files.notes: This file contains multiple Guide Lessons sections merged together, plus a short poem at the end. The first section is Lesson I on Theology covering the days of the judges. The second section includes both Lesson II (Work and Business) and Lesson III (Genealogy and Literature), with the genealogy section on nicknames and the literature section on true stories. The final section is a short spring poem by Mrs. Parley Nelson.
